description: From the manufacturer Juice 12W USB Plug & USB C Charger Cable KEEP ALL YOUR DEVICES JUICED UP - compatible with all USB-C devices, this USB plug and USB C charger cable is ideal for Samsung devices, Google phones, Huawei, LG, Motorola, USB-C powered tablets and even PS5, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch controllers USB Plug and USB C Charger Cable This is a fast charger plug with an integrated USB C cable, compatible with all USB-C devices. Huge Compatibility Suitable for a wide range of devices including Samsung, Google Phones, Huawei, LG, Motorola, USB-C powered tablets and even PS5, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch controllers Sure Grip Design Easy to insert and remove from your wall socket, this fast charger plug is specially designed to provide a better fit and more secure grip in your hand. Rapid Charging Featuring an impressive 12W output, this USB-C charger plug powers up mobile devices quickly and efficiently, ideal for giving your phone a boost. Long Durable Cable The phone charger's 1.5m cable length means you won't be stuck by the plug, giving you freedom to continue using your device while charging. Kinder to the Planet The phone charger and USB cable are made from 100% recycled post-consumer waste, plus the packaging is fully recyclable too.
